summary: FR-SHARE-001 (JSON Export & Import) implementation is complete on branch feature/17-json-export-import. PR #55 is open and ready for review. All 7 test IDs from test PR #51 are satisfied by the production code. Implementation includes: exportService.ts (versioned JSON export/import with XSS sanitization), ActionBar.tsx (Export/Import buttons with data-testid attributes and FileReader-based import), and Notification.tsx (accessible notification overlay). Handoff artifacts 032_frontend-coding-agent_complete.json and 032_frontend-coding-agent_HANDOFF.md committed on the branch.

artifacts.name: exportService
artifacts.description: exportModelJSON + importModelJSON with versioned JSON format and XSS sanitization

artifacts.name: ActionBar
artifacts.description: Export/Import buttons with data-testid=btn-export and data-testid=btn-import, FileReader-based import, error isolation

artifacts.name: Notification
artifacts.description: Accessible notification overlay with role=status aria-live=polite

artifacts.name: implementation-PR
artifacts.description: PR #55: [area:frontend] FR-SHARE-001: JSON Export & Import Implementation (#17)

human_review_required: E2E tests require a running dev server; CI must be configured to run pnpm dev before pnpm test:e2e

recommended_actions: Verify exportService.ts: exportModelJSON uses Blob+anchor, importModelJSON validates version+bricks fields and sanitizes all fields
Verify XSS sanitization: type/colorId/rotation allowlists, id truncated to 64 chars (NFR-SEC-002)
Verify ActionBar.tsx: btn-export triggers exportModelJSON, btn-import triggers FileReader, errors show notification without corrupting scene (CLR-05)
Verify Notification.tsx: role=status aria-live=polite, auto-dismisses after 3s, robust error detection
Cross-reference test PR #51 to confirm all 7 test IDs are satisfied by the implementation
